file.content:
name: linux
on:
  push:
    paths-ignore: ["docs/**", "**.adoc", "**.md"]
  pull_request:
    paths-ignore: ["docs/**", "**.adoc", "**.md"]
jobs:
  build:
    strategy:
      matrix:
        tls:
          - engine: mbed
            pkg: libmbedtls-dev
            dir: build.mbed
          - engine: wolf
            pkg: libwolfssl-dev
            dir: build.wolf
        pollq:
          - poller: auto
          - poller: epoll
          - poller: select
          - poller: poll
    name: build
    runs-on: [ubuntu-24.04]
    steps:
      - name: Check out code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install ninja
        run: sudo apt-get install ninja-build

      - name: Install TLS engine
        run: sudo apt-get install ${{ matrix.tls.pkg }}

      - name: Configure
        run: mkdir ${{ matrix.tls.dir }} && cd ${{ matrix.tls.dir }} && cmake -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -D NNG_ENABLE_TLS=ON -DNNG_POLLQ_POLLER=${{ matrix.pollq.poller }} -DNNG_TLS_ENGINE=${{ matrix.tls.engine }} ..

      - name: Build
        run: cd ${{ matrix.tls.dir }} && ninja

      - name: Test
        run: cd ${{ matrix.tls.dir }} && ctest --output-on-failure

content.thinking:
Perfect! I found the workflow. The job is running with:
- Matrix: tls.engine=mbed, tls.pkg=libmbedtls-dev, tls.dir=build.mbed, pollq.poller=auto
- OS: ubuntu-24.04
- Steps:
  1. Check out code (actions/checkout@v4)
  2. Install ninja: `sudo apt-get install ninja-build`
  3. Install TLS engine: `sudo apt-get install libmbedtls-dev`
  4. Configure: `mkdir build.mbed && cd build.mbed && cmake -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -D NNG_ENABLE_TLS=ON -DNNG_POLLQ_POLLER=auto -DNNG_TLS_ENGINE=mbed ..`
  5. Build: `cd build.mbed && ninja`
  6. Test: `cd build.mbed && ctest --output-on-failure`

Now I'll write the Dockerfile and run.sh to reproduce this in Docker.

content.text: Perfect! I can see the job configuration. The job builds nng with mbed TLS engine using the auto poller. Now let me write the **PHASE 2: Dockerfile and run.sh**.

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    cmake \
    ninja-build \
    libmbedtls-dev \
    git \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN mkdir build.mbed && \
    cd build.mbed && \
    cmake -G Ninja \
        -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug \
        -DNNG_ENABLE_TLS=ON \
        -DNNG_POLLQ_POLLER=auto \
        -DNNG_TLS_ENGINE=mbed \
        .. && \
    ninja

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

set -e

cd /app/build.mbed
ctest --output-on-failure

echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
